subcodes.first_line: The purpose underlaying the revelation of every heavenly Book, nay, of every divinely-revealed verse
subcodes.first_line_orig: مقصود از کتابهای آسمانی و آیات الهی آنکه مردمان بادابی تربیت شوند که سبب
subcodes.subjects: @purpose of religion in the world (personal and social), @two aspects of the human soul; the higher and lower natures, @spiritual transformation, @call to action, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
